headline: Business Development Manager at Atrapos Media | MBA Candidate
summary:
Experienced professional in Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising, currently serving as Business Development Manager at Atrapos Media. I focus on driving business growth across a diverse portfolio that includes Digital Signage Networks (DOOH), Double Decker Buses ,Metro and Tram formats.
I work closely with brands, agencies, and direct clients to develop strategic partnerships and deliver tailored advertising solutions that align with their objectives and maximize visibility. My role combines relationship management, campaign coordination, and market analysis to ensure impactful results and long-term collaborations.

Passionate about innovation in media, I continuously explore market trends and client insights to strengthen our product offerings and create meaningful connections between brands and audiences.

experiences.title: Business Development Manager
experiences.description:
•  Drive business growth across a diverse Out-of-Home (OOH) portfolio, including Digital Signage Networks (DOOH products), Metro, Tram, and Double Decker Buses.

•  Develop strategic partnerships by collaborating with brands, agencies, and direct clients to expand market reach and increase campaign adoption.

•  Create tailored advertising solutions by aligning client objectives with the most impactful OOH formats to maximise visibility.

•  Manage and strengthen client relationships, ensuring satisfaction and long-term strategic collaborations.

•  Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth campaign execution and foster innovation in media offerings.
•  Continuously monitor market trends, and client feedback to enhance product positioning.

experiences.title: Project Manager
experiences.description:
• Digital Signage Network (DSN) Management: Oversee and maintain the digital signage network, ensuring optimal performance and reliability.

• Coordination of Equipment Installation: Lead the planning and execution of digital signage equipment installations, ensuring timely and efficient setups.

• Staff Training and Development: Train and support staff on the use and maintenance of digital signage equipment, fostering technical proficiency and confidence.

• On-Site Support and Project Monitoring: Provide on-site technical support and actively monitor project progress, ensuring adherence to timelines and quality standards. Support the creation of technical drawings and comprehensive documentation, including a full set of as-built drawings upon project completion.

• Client and Partner Relationship Management: Cultivate and manage relationships with digital signage venue owners and clients, ensuring satisfaction and fostering long-term partnerships.

• Internal Project Communication Management: Facilitate effective communication across teams within the company, ensuring all stakeholders are informed and aligned on project goals and progress.

experiences.title: Assistant Manager
experiences.description:
• Campaign Booking Management: Process and manage campaign bookings, ensuring accuracy and timely execution.

• Sales Team Support: Assist the sales team and managers with various tasks, contributing to overall sales effectiveness and efficiency.

• Customer Documentation Preparation: Prepare detailed and accurate booking documents for customers, ensuring clarity and professionalism.

• Client Presentation Development: Create compelling keynote presentations for clients, tailored to meet their specific needs and objectives.

• Post-Campaign Analysis: Conduct thorough post-campaign analysis and provide proof of posting, delivering valuable insights and performance metrics to clients.

experiences.title: Research & Development
experiences.description:
• Market Research: Conduct comprehensive market research to identify emerging trends, customer needs, and competitive landscape insights.

• Implementation of New Tools: Introduce and integrate innovative tools and technologies to enhance company operations and productivity.

• New Product Development: Lead the development of new products, tailored to meet the evolving demands of the company’s customers.

• Product Testing: Perform rigorous testing of new products to ensure quality, functionality, and customer satisfaction.

• Ad Market Monitoring: Continuously monitor advertising markets to stay informed about industry developments and opportunities for growth.

education.description: Relevant Courses: Client Services in Advertising, Advertising Copywriting & Evaluation, Brand Building in Advertising, Foundations of Contemporary Media.
Relevant Courses: Marketing Communications, Promotions & Digital Activation, Management Principles, Consumer Behavior,Marketing Management

accomplishment_projects.title: Junior Achievement Company (2015-16)
accomplishment_projects.description: During 2015-16 school period I had the great honor to be a part of Junior Achievement club of my school Junior Achievement  is an educational programe based on principle of “learning by doing” and we,the students have the opportunity to create our own company and understand the stages of operation and how to set up a company successfully I was the Information Technology Manager and one of the members of the team that representing our club in the annual competition and also in the finals. Our Company “BUDGEE” developed an application for IOS devices concerning Financial Budgeting and Money Management for Teenagers. “BUDGEE” won the “ECONOMY” award in Pan-Hellenic level and the 4th place out of 74 schools from all over Greece.Also i won a scholarship for attending the Entrepreneurship Summer School at Athens University of Economics and Business.
